series_metadata.series_description: This record series serves to fulfill the requirements of O.R. C. 149.01. The Annual Report provides information on agency activities for the current fiscal year. The Annual Report may also contain information about the financial outlook, accomplishments, goals, and year end statistics.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years after end of reporting fiscal year, then shred/delete. The report may be sent to the State Library if need be to fulfill ORC 149.01 as applicable. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after end of reporting fiscal year, then shred/delete. The report may be sent to the State Library if need be to fulfill ORC 149.01 as applicable.., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
